description: Anonymised identifier of the expert teacher (P01-P05).
Years of teaching experience in programming, verbatim transcription of the participant's handwritten response.
permitted_values: free text

description: Years of teaching experience converted to a numeric value (4 semesters converted as 2 years).
permitted_values: non-negative integer

description: Programming courses currently taught by the participant.
permitted_values: free text; multiple subjects separated by ';'

description: Programming languages mastered by the participant.
permitted_values: free text; multiple languages separated by ';'

description: Section A - Practical Usefulness. Statement: "The SimilCode system facilitates the detection of similarities in student code." Five-point Likert scale.
permitted_values: 1 = Strongly disagree; 2 = Disagree; 3 = Neither agree nor disagree; 4 = Agree; 5 = Strongly agree

description: Section A - Practical Usefulness. Statement: "The multidimensional analysis (lexical, structural, stylistic, functional, and syntactic) provides valuable information for code evaluation." Five-point Likert scale.
permitted_values: 1 = Strongly disagree; 2 = Disagree; 3 = Neither agree nor disagree; 4 = Agree; 5 = Strongly agree

description: Section A - Practical Usefulness. Statement: "The algorithmic complexity calculation (Big O) is useful for evaluating the efficiency of student code." Five-point Likert scale.
